news.title: New UChicago digital research tool opens paths connecting cultures and continents
news.summary_en: Maps of Chicago, Guerrilla Television, Middle East photographs, and more are connected with metadata to power research

news.title: UChicago alumni earn Pulitzer Prizes for international and local reporting
news.summary_en: Journalists Dake Kang, AB’16, and Caroline Kubzansky, AB’21, recognized for investigating mass surveillance in China and ‘Operation Midway Blitz’

news.title: The Toll of the On-Again, Off-Again War in Iran
Are randomized controlled trials harming nonprofits?
news.summary_en: In recent book, UChicago’s Nicole P. Marwell and Jennifer E. Mosley argue that the research method isn’t always the best tool
